title: Samayapuram Mariamman Temple
tagline: Samayapuram Mariamman Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Arulmigu Sri Mariamman Temple, Samayapuram is an ancient Hindu temple in Tiruchirappalli district in Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Arulmigu Sri Mariamman Temple, Samayapuram is an ancient Hindu temple in Tiruchirappalli district in Tamil Nadu, India. The main deity, Samayapuram Mariamman, a form of Adi Parashakti and Mariamman, is made of sand and clay with extractions of medicinal herbs unlike many of the traditional stone idols and is considered as most powerful Goddess, and hence unlike many other Hindu deities there are no abhishekams (sacred bathing) conducted to the main deity, but instead the "abishekam" is done to the small stone statue in front of it. topPlaces.name: Samayapuram Pojeeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Samayapuram Pojeeswarar Temple is a Hindu Temple located at Samayapuram near Trichy, Tamilnadu, India.

topPlaces.name: South Kannanur
topPlaces.description: South Kannanur is a Neighborhood of Tiruchirapalli in Tiruchirappalli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Battle of Kannanur
topPlaces.description: The Battle of Kannanur took place in 1342, in what is now Kannanur, Tamil Nadu, India. This clash involved the Hoysala dynasty and the Madurai Sultanate.

topPlaces.name: Samayapuram
topPlaces.description: Samayapuram is a Neighborhood of Tiruchirappalli in Tamil Nadu, India, twelve kilometers north of the heart of the city, on the Trichy-Chennai highway. The Samayapuram Mariamman Temple, a prominent place of Hindu worship, is located here.

topPlaces.name: Kalpalayam
topPlaces.description: Kalpalayam is a village located in the Manachanallur taluk of the Tiruchirappalli district of the Indian state Tamil Nadu. It is situated 5 km away from taluk headquarter Manachanallur and 20 km away from district headquarter Tiruchirappalli.

topPlaces.name: Manachanallur
topPlaces.description: Mannachanallur is a neighbourhood in the city of Tiruchirapalli (Trichy or Tiruchi) and Taluk in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It was merged with the Tiruchirappalli Corporation in 2023.

topPlaces.name: Manachanallur taluk
topPlaces.description: Manachanallur taluk is a taluk of Tiruchirapalli district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Manachanallur.

topPlaces.name: Valadi
topPlaces.description: Valadi is a zone in Tiruchirappalli city, located on 5 miles from Chathram Bus Terminus in Trichy, Tamil Nadu along the Trichy-Chennai railway. There is a World War I memorial in Valadi on the Valadi Lalgudi highway.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Samayapuram Mariamman Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Samayapuram Mariamman Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Samayapuram Mariamman Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (17 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (15 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Samayapuram Mariamman Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Samayapuram Mariamman Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Samayapuram Mariamman Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Samayapuram Mariamman Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Samayapuram Mariamman Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Samayapuram Pojeeswarar Temple, South Kannanur, Battle of Kannanur, Samayapuram, Kalpalayam.
